atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Defines the custom theme variables for Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Defines a custom utility class in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Defines a custom variant in Tailwind CSS v4.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Tells Tailwind which 'bucket' a set of custom styles belongs to. Valid buckets are base, components, and utilities.
